description_long: This object is a rugged, military-style radio receiver with a robust olive-green metal casing. The front panel features a large circular speaker grille on the left, a prominent rotary dial with volume markings from 0 to 5, and two black control knobs below a labeled section. There is a rectangular label with technical information and a brand marking, as well as a protective metal plate above the controls. The sides and back are plain, with the back being completely featureless and the sides showing the depth of the casing. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for field or industrial use. The materials and build indicate it is designed to withstand rough handling and outdoor environments.
description: A rugged olive-green metal radio receiver with a large speaker grille, rotary dial, and control knobs on the front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, rotary dial, control knobs, labels, and protective plate.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, unadorned metal casing and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain, featureless metal back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the thickness and solid construction of the casing.
